title: Round to nearest 10 or 100
description: Practice rounding to the nearest ten and rounding to the nearest hundred.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the mass of the chick to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] grams
hints: The chick has a mass of $\blueD{135} \text { g}$.

$\blueD{135}$ is between $100$ and $200$.

[[☃ image 1]]



Which hundred is $\blueD{135}$ closest to?
$\blueD{135}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $100$.

options.alt: A hanging scale weighing a baby chicken. The weight of the chicken on the scale is shown as 135 grams.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the mass of the walrus to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] kilograms
hints: The walrus has a mass of $\blueD{887} \text { kg}$.

$\blueD{887}$ is between $800$ and $900$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which hundred is $\blueD{887}$ closest to?
$\blueD{887}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $900$.

options.alt: A hanging scale weighing a walrus. The weight of the walrus on the scale is shown as 887 kilograms.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]



**Round the temperature to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] degrees
hints: The temperature is $\blueD{38}$ degrees.

$\blueD{38}$ is between $30$ and $40$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which ten is $\blueD{38}$ closest to?
$\blueD{38}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $40$.

options.alt: A Celsius thermometer with a temperature of 38 degrees Celsius.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the temperature to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] degrees
hints: The temperature is $\blueD{92}$ degrees.

$\blueD{92}$ is between $90$ and $100$.

[[☃ image 1]]



Which ten is $\blueD{92}$ closest to?
$\blueD{92}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $90$.

options.alt: A Celsius thermometer with a temperature of 92 degrees Celsius.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the amount of grape juice to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{mL}$
hints: The amount of grape juice is $\blueD{44}\text{ mL}$.

$\blueD{44}$ is between $40$ and $50$.

[[☃ image 1]]



Which ten is $\blueD{44}$ closest to?
$\blueD{44}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $40$.

options.alt: A graduated cylinder labeled with tick marks at 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, and 70 milliliters. An unlabeled tick mark appears between each labeled tick mark. A purple liquid inside the graduated cylinder measures to 44 milliliters. A label for 44 milliliters appears to the right of the graduated cylinder.

assessment_items.question_content:
[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the amount of apple juice to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] mL
hints: The amount of apple juice is $\blueD{356}\text{ mL}$.

$\blueD{356}$ is between $300$ and $400$.

[[☃ image 1]]



Which hundred is $\blueD{356}$ closest to?
$\blueD{356}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $400$.

options.alt: A graduated cylinder with tick marks at every 50 milliliter unit. The apple juice inside the cylinder measures to 356 milliliters.

assessment_items.question_content:
Art class ends at $1{:}43$ in the afternoon.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the time to the nearest ten minutes.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] : [[☃ numeric-input 2]] in the afternoon
hints: The time is $\maroonD{1}{:}\blueD{43}$ in the afternoon.  That is $\maroonD{1}$ hour and $\blueD{43}$ minutes after noon.

$\blueD{43}$ is between $40$ and $50$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which ten is $\blueD{43}$ closest to?
$\maroonD{1}{:}\blueD{43}$ rounded to the nearest ten minutes is $1{:}40$.

options.alt: A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute, showing the short hand between the 1 and 2 and the long hand on the third tick mark after the 8.

assessment_items.question_content:
Dequan's mom left for work at $5{:}51$ in the morning.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Round the time to the nearest hour.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] : [[☃ numeric-input 2]] in the morning
hints: The time is $\maroonD{5}{:}\blueD{51}$ in the morning.  That is $\maroonD{5}$ hours and $\blueD{51}$ minutes after midnight.

There are $60$ minutes in an hour.

$\blueD{51}$ is between $0$ and $60$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which hour is $\maroonD{5}{:}\blueD{51}$ closest to?
$\maroonD{5}{:}\blueD{51}$ rounded to the nearest hour is $6{:}00$.

options.alt: A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute, showing the short hand between the 5 and 6 and the long hand on the first tick mark after the 10.

assessment_items.question_content:
My favorite wizard book has $317$ pages.  

**Round the number of pages in the book to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] pages
hints:
$\blueD{317}$ is between $310$ and $320$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which ten is $\blueD{317}$ closest to?
$\blueD{317}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $320$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Greg drove $53\text{ km}$ to see his favorite punk rock band. 

**Round the distance Greg drove to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\text{ km}$
hints:
$\blueD{53}$ is between $50$ and $60$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which ten is $\blueD{53}$ closest to?
$\blueD{53}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $50$.

assessment_items.question_content:
The chicken took $75$ seconds to cross the road.  

**Round the number of seconds to the nearest ten.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] seconds
hints:
$\blueD{75}$ is between $70$ and $80$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which ten is $\blueD{75}$ closest to?

$\blueD{75}$ is in the middle of $70$ and $80$.  

When a number is the same distance from both tens, we round up.
$\blueD{75}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $80$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Yikes!  Sarah the shark has $239$ teeth.  

**Round the number of teeth Sarah has to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] teeth
hints:
$\blueD{239}$ is between $200$ and $300$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which hundred is $\blueD{239}$ closest to?
$\blueD{239}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $200$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Our class collected $644$ pennies for the local animal shelter.  

**Round the number of pennies to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] pennies
hints:
$\blueD{644}$ is between $600$ and $700$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which hundred is $\blueD{644}$ closest to?
$\blueD{644}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $600$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Lisa's building set has $461$ pieces. 

**Round the number of pieces to the nearest hundred.**  

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] pieces

[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
$\blueD{461}$ is between $400$ and $500$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which hundred is $\blueD{461}$ closest to?
$\blueD{461}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $500$.

options.alt: A toy car building set with 461 pieces.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following numbers round to $700$  if we are rounding to the nearest hundred?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $700$ is $650$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $700$ is $749$.

[[☃ image 1]]

So, any whole number from $650$ to $749$ rounds to $700$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The following number rounds to $700$:

$652$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following numbers round to $100$  if we are rounding to the nearest hundred?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $100$ is $50$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $100$ is $149$.

[[☃ image 1]]

So, any whole number from $50$ to $149$ rounds to $100$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The following numbers round to $100$:

$98, 134$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following numbers round to $800$  if we are rounding to the nearest hundred?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $800$ is $750$. 

[[☃ image 2]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $800$ is $849$.

[[☃ image 1]]

So, any whole number from $750 $ to $849$ rounds to $800$.

[[☃ image 2]]

The following numbers round to $800$:

$765, 823, 840$

[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $761$ to the nearest ten.**  
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]]  


**Round $761$ to the nearest hundred.**  
 [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
Let's graph $\purpleD{761}$ on a number line.  

[[☃ image 1]]

First, we can look at the $\blueD{\text{tens}}$.   

$\purpleD{\text{761}}$ is between $\blueD{760}$ and $\blueD{770}$ but closer to $\blueD{760}$.  So, $\purpleD{\text{761}}$ rounds down to  $\blueD{760}$.


[[☃ image 1]]



Next, let's look at the $\greenD{\text{hundreds}}$.   

$\purpleD{\text{761}}$ is between $\greenD{700}$ and $\greenD{800}$ but closer to $\greenD{800}$.  So, $\purpleD{\text{761}}$ rounds up to  $\greenD{800}$.

[[☃ image 1]]




$\purpleD{\text{761}}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $\blueD{760}$.

$\purpleD{\text{761}}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $\greenD{800}$.

assessment_items.question_content:

 [[☃ numeric-input 1]]  


**Round $543$ to the nearest hundred.**  
 [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
Let's graph $\purpleD{543}$ on a number line.  


[[☃ image 1]]

First, we can look at the $\blueD{\text{tens}}$.   

$\purpleD{\text{543}}$ is between $\blueD{540}$ and $\blueD{550}$ but closer to $\blueD{540}$.  So, $\purpleC{\text{543}}$ rounds down to  $\blueD{540}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

Next, let's look at the $\greenD{\text{hundreds}}$.   

$\purpleD{\text{543}}$ is between $\greenD{500}$ and $\greenD{600}$ but closer to $\greenD{500}$.  So, $\purpleD{\text{543}}$ rounds down to  $\greenD{500}$.


[[☃ image 1]]

$\purpleD{\text{543}}$ rounded to the nearest ten is $\blueD{540}$.

$\purpleD{\text{543}}$ rounded to the nearest hundred is $\greenD{500}$.
